nonBlockingIssues.description: Position-based matching in merge function is fragile - if courses are reordered, statuses could be misapplied. This is a known limitation documented in the handoff.
Failure event creation error handling could lead to silent data inconsistency where status is updated but failure event isn't recorded. Consider atomic transactions.
Type assertion 'as never' on failure_events update could mask type mismatches.
Consider adding error handling for plan_courses query - currently fails silently and proceeds with unmerged plan_data.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the co-located test file pattern: test files should be placed alongside components in the same directory (e.g., course-card.tsx and course-card.test.tsx in src/components/)
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All three features reviewed use this pattern consistently (34 tests in course-card.test.tsx, recovery-message.test.tsx, plan-data-merge.test.ts)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the React stale closure fix pattern: when using useCallback with state-dependent functions, extract logic into a pure function that takes previous state as parameter, compute the new value first, then use it for both setState and persistence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Commit c82db7d fixed a stale closure issue in course-status-tracking by using computed variable approach instead of functional setState

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add accessibility convention: status indicators must include non-color cues (icons, labels, strikethrough) for accessibility compliance
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: course-status-tracking and ai-recovery-flow both use icons (✓, ◐, ✕, ⏳, ✗) alongside color coding

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the 'as never' type assertion pattern for Supabase operations - used when TypeScript strictness conflicts with Supabase's dynamic typing
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple API routes use 'as never' for Supabase insert/update calls (course-status, accept-alternative routes)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the dual-storage pattern for plan data: plan_data JSONB for structure + plan_courses table for status tracking, with merge function to ensure consistency on load
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: failure-persistence-and-isolation implements mergeCourseStatusIntoPlanData() to merge plan_courses into plan_data as a persistence safety net

course-status-tracking.summary: Well-implemented with comprehensive test coverage. All 5 status options implemented with distinct visual indicators (color + icons). Stale closure fix in c82db7d correctly resolved persistence bug.

ai-recovery-flow.summary: Comprehensive implementation with 31 tests. All requirements met: automatic triggers, dependent course analysis, alternative suggestions, waitlisted messaging, prerequisite validation. Clean separation of concerns.

failure-persistence-and-isolation.summary: Thorough implementation with user ownership checks, failure_events resolution tracking, plan data merge function, and 29 tests. Plan isolation verified, persistence across sessions confirmed.
